title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Kale Consultants

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Kale Consultants
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Kale Consultants. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
